title: dianthus elbrusensis
intro: Dianthus elbrusensis, also known as Elbrus pink or Caucasus pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This perennial plant is native to the Caucasus region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dianthus elbrusensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
